title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Ivankov, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 0–3.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Nobody who has fought with Magellan

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: One type of poison is one thing,

dialogue.text: This is no joke!!! Do something!!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: unfortu- lately, there's nothing we can do...

dialogue.text: the "miracle worker," the Okama King Iva....!!!

dialogue.text: People that doctors had given up on...

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
